summary: Decent audience tape that at least captures a solid performance of Bertha.
review: Both reviewers give the recording a middling three‑star rating. The first notes an "ok aud recording" and is pleased it includes a rendition of "Bertha," suggesting the sound is acceptable but unremarkable. The second review provides no musical detail, leaving the show quality largely unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief, neutral reviews; both rate the release 3 stars and give minimal commentary, so the overall rating reflects an average show with acceptable audience sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "ok" by a reviewer; no specific issues or praise noted beyond it being an audience capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
